name: spfx-kit
description: Monorepo for authoring, importing, previewing, and shipping SPFx applications and web parts.

scripts.prepare: test "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" = "$PWD" && git config --local core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks || exit 0
scripts.dev: npm run sync:lab && turbo run dev --filter @spfx-kit/lab
scripts.build: npm run sync:lab && turbo run build
scripts.test:security: npm --workspace @spfx-kit/code-workbench-runtime run build && node scripts/tests/code-workbench-graph-search.mjs && npm --workspace @spfx-kit/spfx-tools run test:safe-copy && node scripts/tests/lab-api-security.mjs
